name: Turnover
description: VFX and turnover workflow tools for Final Cut Pro.
author: Turnover

methods.name: status
methods.description: Return plugin runtime and permission status

methods.name: request_screen_recording
methods.description: Request Screen Recording permission for the current FCP process

methods.name: conform_prep_verify
methods.description: Verify a Conform Prep result by choosing original/imported XML and optional CSV files

methods.name: data_burn_in
methods.description: Export a transparent ProRes 4444 Data Burn-In overlay using a Turnover preset

methods.name: data_burn_in_open
methods.description: Export the current FCP project XML and open it in Turnover for Data Burn-In customization

methods.name: marker_export
methods.description: Export timeline markers to EDL, CSV, or TXT

filter.description: all, standard, todo, chapter, or recheck

methods.name: vfx_shot_list_recover
methods.description: Generate VFX Shot List Excel from current timeline data and an existing thumbnail folder without recapturing

methods.name: vfx_auto_marker
methods.description: Run VFX Auto Marker by marker kind

rename_markers.description: Optional. Rename/note markers from VFX titles via FCPXML import. Defaults to false.

methods.name: capture_fullscreen_viewer
methods.description: Capture the largest visible Final Cut Pro window for fullscreen playback preview

methods.name: run_tool
methods.description: Run a Turnover tool by id
